message:
fix: clear all cargo clippy warnings across workspace

- Remove 33 unnecessary i64 casts on libc::SYS_* constants
- Remove 8 unnecessary unsafe blocks around sys_exit_group
- Remove unused OnceLock import from stdio_abi.rs
- Add #[allow(dead_code)] for OnceLock host_*_fn accessors and
  FlatCombiningStats::new (used only after prewarm)
- Fix collapsible if/match in printf render, glibc_internal, unistd
- Fix .into_iter() → direct iteration in rcu/mod.rs
- Fix collapsible match+if in elf/loader.rs and string/regex.rs
- Replace b"libc.so.6\0" with c"libc.so.6" in pthread_abi.rs
- Auto-fix 14 collapsible-if warnings via cargo clippy --fix

All gates now pass:
- cargo fmt --check: 0 issues
- cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings: 0 errors

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
